author: Ameen Hassan
summary: User ran `claude mcp list` to check which MCP servers are configured. Only one server was found: plugin:github:github, connecting via HTTP to the GitHub Copilot MCP endpoint. The server failed to connect at the time of the check. No other servers (including ameen-context) appeared in the list.
problems: ameen-context MCP server does not appear in `claude mcp list` output
plugin:github:github MCP server failed to connect
approaches: Ran `claude mcp list` to audit currently registered MCP servers
results: `claude mcp list` returned only one server: plugin:github:github (HTTP, failed to connect)
ameen-context server is not registered or not visible in the MCP list
open_questions: Why is ameen-context not appearing in `claude mcp list`?
Was `claude mcp add ameen-context -s user python3 ...` ever successfully run?
Is the GitHub Copilot MCP failure transient or a persistent misconfiguration?
